page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 60.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.5 GB per core. For acceleration, it is equipped with a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 472 GB SSD, and the baseline network bandwidth is rated at 3 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between CPU and GPU performance. The CPU exhibits weak to poor performance in raw computational tasks, with stress-ng single-core scoring in the bottom 10% and multi-core in the bottom 25%. Similarly, cryptographic, database, and memory bandwidth benchmarks generally fall into the weak category. However, the integrated NVIDIA P100 GPU delivers strong results for machine learning workloads. LLM inference speeds for both prompt processing and text generation using 135M and 7B models rank in the top tier, demonstrating the instance's capability in handling specialized parallel processing tasks despite its modest CPU performance.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge represents a legacy GPU tier. It trades off modern CPU performance and high-speed memory bandwidth for access to dedicated GPU acceleration and local SSD storage. This makes it a viable option for workloads that are heavily GPU-dependent but do not require high-performance host CPUs. Appropriate workloads include small-to-medium LLM inference, legacy CUDA-based parallel computing, and basic GPU-accelerated data processing, whereas it is less suited for CPU-bound database operations or high-throughput web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz, 60.0 GB of RAM, and a 472 GB local SSD. It is equipped with a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. While CPU-based benchmarks show weak performance, with stress-ng single-core in the bottom 10% and multi-core in the bottom 25%, the instance excels in GPU-driven tasks. LLM inference benchmarks for 135M and 7B models rank in the top tier, demonstrating strong parallel processing capabilities. This instance offers a qualitative tradeoff, providing dedicated GPU acceleration and local SSD storage at the expense of host CPU performance. It is best suited for small-to-medium machine learning inference, legacy CUDA workloads, and GPU-accelerated data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 60 GB RAM, a 472 GB SSD, and an NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU, offering strong LLM inference performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge features 8 vCPUs, 60 GB RAM, a 472 GB SSD, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU for accelerated machine learning workloads.
tagline: A legacy GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, local SSD storage, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
1x NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM
60.0 GB system memory and 472 GB local SSD storage
Top-tier LLM inference performance for 135M and 7B models
Weak CPU-only performance in standard computational benchmarks
Suited for legacy CUDA applications and small-scale machine learning
